monster.name: BrotherThaddeus
monster.description: An elderly man, thin, with calloused hands of someone who has worked his entire life. Shaved head, short white beard. He still wears the insignia of the order of Tyr — a **stylized severed hand** embroidered on his tunic — despite having left the order. He says he wears it "to remember what it should have been, not what it became." He speaks with a calm and measured voice, choosing his words carefully. He has the gaze of someone who has seen too much and decided not to look away. He drinks herbal teas, never alcohol. Distinctive trait: disarming honesty. He tells the truth even when it would be more convenient to lie — and that's precisely what makes him hard to believe.
